description: Elena and Mack share an intimate moment, revealing their growing closeness. Mack receives a message that visibly unsettles him, prompting him to leave abruptly. Elena is concerned but Mack declines to explain what is bothering him, setting up further personal conflict for later in the episode.

transcript.line: I'm happy Turtleman came out to play this morning. You. You're Turtleman. It's not a nickname for your...
Okay, I get it. I get it.
We could find a nickname for it...
Mm-hmm. I mean, sure, you're an engineer, and you're smart, and your insides are great. But this outside, these arms, they don't even seem real.
Oh. You're not so bad yourself.
I'm a knockout. And I'm thirsty. Want some water?
Oh, is it time for the mission already?
Uh, no, it's a change of plans. I... I'm not gonna be on this one. I was just covering the communications here, anyway. I, uh, I got to do something else.
Is that the text you just got?
Yeah. It's just a change of plans. It's, uh... Look. I'm sorry. I know it's bad timing, but you guys are gonna be fine. Okay? I'm gonna catch up with you when you get back.
